surface_strategy.page_wrapper: relative w-full min-h-screen bg-[#080B1F] text-white overflow-hidden z-0 [color-scheme:dark] dark
background_orbs: absolute top-[-10%] left-[-10%] w-[40vw] h-[40vw] rounded-full bg-[#B026FF] opacity-20 blur-[120px] -z-10 pointer-events-none
absolute bottom-[-10%] right-[-10%] w-[40vw] h-[40vw] rounded-full bg-[#00F0FF] opacity-15 blur-[120px] -z-10 pointer-events-none
surface_strategy.glass_card: bg-[#101427]/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-[inset_0_1px_1px_rgba(255,255,255,0.15),0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] transition-all duration-300

kpi_card.base: relative overflow-hidden bg-[#101427]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg group hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300

tabs.list: inline-flex p-1 bg-[#101427]/80 backdrop-blur-md rounded-xl border border-white/5
tabs.trigger: px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-slate-400 hover:text-white data-[state=active]:bg-white/10 data-[state=active]:text-white data-[state=active]:shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] transition-all duration-200

inputs.base: bg-[#101427]/50 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00F0FF]/50 focus:border-transparent transition-all backdrop-blur-md
inputs.select_content: bg-[#101427]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 text-white shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.7)]

table.container: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-[#101427]/40 backdrop-blur-xl
table.header: bg-white/5 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400 font-medium border-b border-white/10
table.inline_bar_fill: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00F0FF] to-[#B026FF] h-full rounded-full shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,240,255,0.6)]

defs: <linearGradient id='cyanBar' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stopColor='#00F0FF' stopOpacity='1'/><stop offset='100%' stopColor='#00D2FF' stopOpacity='0.2'/></linearGradient>
<linearGradient id='purpleBar' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stopColor='#B026FF' stopOpacity='1'/><stop offset='100%' stopColor='#FF00FF' stopOpacity='0.2'/></linearGradient>
charts.glow_filter: <filter id='neonGlow' x='-20%' y='-20%' width='140%' height='140%'><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation='3' result='blur' /><feMerge><feMergeNode in='blur' /><feMergeNode in='SourceGraphic' /></feMerge></filter>

micro_interactions.entrance: animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-700 ease-out fill-mode-forwards

instructions_to_main_agent: Wrap the entire Dashboard component return in a master container: `<div className="relative w-full min-h-screen bg-[#080B1F] text-white overflow-hidden z-0 [color-scheme:dark] dark">` to force the dark styling regardless of global theme.
Place the `background_orbs` `div`s as the first children inside this wrapper to act as the underglow backdrop.
Inject Recharts definitions (<svg width="0" height="0"><defs>...</defs></svg>) containing the `cyanBar`, `purpleBar` linear gradients, and `neonGlow` filter into the DOM before the charts render.
For Recharts <Bar /> components, use `fill="url(#cyanBar)"` and `filter="url(#neonGlow)"` for Period A, and `fill="url(#purpleBar)"` for Period B. This creates the neon glass effect.
Apply `glass_card` tailwind classes to all main layout panels and chart wrappers.
Assign specific gradients from `kpi_card.gradients` to each KPI card's background. Use `kpi_card.icon_glow` classes on their respective lucide-react icons.
Ensure the central text in the Donut chart has a glowing effect using `charts.donut.centerText`.
Preserve ALL original data, functionalities, API mock integrations, and `data-testid` attributes on interactive elements.
Format Currency as Indian Rupees (₹), compact format, keeping existing logic.
Do NOT use generic Card components from shadcn if they override the dark glass styles. Construct custom glass divs using the `glass_card` classes if necessary to ensure exact fidelity.
